title: AI-native trading might be closer than we think
author: Serious_Truck283
selftext:
AI isn’t just analyzing the market anymore, it’s getting closer to trading autonomously. From companies like NVIDIA (NVDA \~$173.72) powering AI infrastructure to newer entrants like Waton Financial ($WTF \~$4.58) building platforms for AI-driven trading, the landscape is changing fast.

If this trend develops, we could see markets where AI agents trade 24/7, adapt strategies on the fly, and reshape how finance works.

Are we looking at a niche experiment or the foundation of a new investing paradigm?
